name: HHR_VLTR_PROJECT_GUEST_VL
query: SELECT B.PROJECT_ID PROJECT_ID, B.GUEST_ID GUEST_ID, T.FIRST_NAME FIRST_NAME, T.LAST_NAME LAST_NAME, T.EMAIL EMAIL, B.T_SIZE T_SIZE, B.T_STYLE T_STYLE, B.IS_MINOR IS_MINOR, B.CREATED_BY CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, B.HCM_PERSON_ID HCM_PERSON_ID FROM HHR_VLTR_PROJECT_GUEST_B B, HHR_VLTR_PROJECT_GUEST_TL T WHERE B.GUEST_ID = T.GUEST_ID AND B.PROJECT_ID = T.PROJECT_ID AND T.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
